project.project_name: Seahorse Offshore Wind Farm GP Survey

comments.comment_text:
Please attach the usage record and inspection record inside of first aid box
13/08/2025: Comment can be closed.
comments.summary_ko: attach the usage record and inspection record inside of first aid box 기술적 확인/수정 필요.
comments.response_text: Appendices #1.1 to #1.3, including the First Aid Kit List, Management Record, and Usage Log, will be compiled in a file binder and placed near the First Aid Box.

comments.comment_text:
"Conduct an emergency drill immediately after each departure to execute the project"
what scenario?
13/08/2025: Comment can be closed.
comments.summary_ko: "Conduct an emergency drill immediately after each departure to execute the proj... 기술적 확인/수정 필요.
comments.response_text:
An Emergency drill is conducted either immediately before or after departure, with the participation of all personnel on board involved in project execution.
Emergency drill scenarios may include fire, explosion, abandon ship, oil spill, emergency steering failure, collision, grounding, and man overboard.
Additionally, in survey areas with a high concentration of buoys, a Desktop Drill for entanglement scenarios is also carried out to ensure preparedness.

comments.comment_text:
Any replacement of crew shall inform client and send the updated training records. 
13/08/2025: Comment can be closed.
comments.summary_ko: Any replacement of crew shall inform client and send the updated training record... 기술적 확인/수정 필요.
comments.response_text: In the event of any crew changes, advance notice will be provided to the client, including the CR, through the weekly meeting. All newly boarding personnel must complete a safety induction conducted by the HSE Manager prior to commencing any project-related activities.

comments.comment_text:
what is executive in Emergency Response Committee?
13/08/2025: Comment can be closed.
comments.summary_ko: what is executive in Emergency Response Committee? 기술적 확인/수정 필요.
comments.response_text:
The Emergency Response Committee (ERC) is convened in the event of significant emergencies or crisis situations classified as Level 2 or higher.
The members of the Committee are responsible for providing essential support to ensure that personnel aboard the survey vessel can fully concentrate on managing the emergency situation on board. Their role includes coordinating timely and appropriate assistance across their respective areas of responsibility.
The Chief Executive Officer (CEO) serves as the top decision maker of the Committee. Once decisions are made, the executives are responsible for carrying out those decisions within their assigned departments.
The executives are typically composed of team leaders from major departments, based on the company’s structure. These include the Project Operations Team Leader, Human Resources Team Leader, and Fleet Management Team Leader.
For example, the Human Resources Team Leader may oversee legal affairs or media response, while the Fleet Management Team Leader is responsible for communication with government agencies and handling insurance related matters.

comments.comment_text:
what is minor incident communication flow?
13/08/2025: Comment can be closed.
comments.summary_ko: what is minor incident communication flow? 기술적 확인/수정 필요.
comments.response_text: In the case of minor personnel incidents (such as Near Misses or first aid cases) or asset damage, the events are reported to the client through the Daily Meeting and the Daily Progress Report (DPR). Additionally, a Minor Incident Report is submitted to the client.

comments.comment_text: Please provide the list of member of ERT
comments.summary_ko: provide the list of member of ERT 추가/제공 필요.
comments.response_text: Once the crew for the G-Ocean vessel is finalized, the Emergency Response Team and assigned roles will be designated in accordance with Appendix #2, and the chart will be posted in the Mess Room.

comments.comment_text:
all incident communication timeline with client shall comply with the Employer HSE requirement
13/08/2025: Comment can be closed.
comments.summary_ko: all incident communication timeline with client shall comply with the Employer H... 검토 및 수정 필요.
comments.response_text:
GEOVIEW’s incident communication timeline is confirmed to be fully compliant with the requirement timeline outlined in Section 18: Incident Notification, Investigation and Reporting of the Annex_1.3_-_HSE_Requirements_for_Offshore_Contractors document provided by EDF.
All incident reports will be prepared with reference to the required information that must be included in the event of an incident.
